  1. org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.provisioning
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar
Package containing Spring Cloud Stream binder classes for Apache Pulsar.
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.provisioning
Package containing Spring Cloud Stream binder provisioning classes for Apache Pulsar.
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.rabbit
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.rabbit.provisioning
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.test
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder
    Class
    Description
    ConsumerDestination
    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).
    ProducerDestination
    Represents a ProducerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionProducerDestination(String, ProducerProperties).
    ProvisioningProvider
    Provisioning SPI that allows the users to provision destinations such as queues and topics.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka
    Class
    Description
    ConsumerDestination
    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).
    ProducerDestination
    Represents a ProducerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionProducerDestination(String, ProducerProperties).

    Class
    Description

    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).
    ProducerDestination
    Represents a ProducerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionProducerDestination(String, ProducerProperties).
    ProvisioningProvider

    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).

  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.provisioning used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.provisioning
    Class
    Description
    ConsumerDestination
    Represents a ConsumerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionConsumerDestination(String, String, ConsumerProperties).
    ProducerDestination
    Represents a ProducerDestination that provides the information about the destination that is physically provisioned through ProvisioningProvider.provisionProducerDestination(String, ProducerProperties).
    ProvisioningException
    Generic unchecked exception to wrap middleware or technology specific exceptions.
    ProvisioningProvider
    Provisioning SPI that allows the users to provision destinations such as queues and topics.
